headline: As March Madness unfolds, NY Fed highlights sports betting toll on consumer credit health
summary: As sports gambling becomes more popular and less restricted, consumer credit health is suffering, according to a new report by the New York Fed.

headline: FICO Score Credit Lab Targets Inclusion While Deepening Lender Analytics Ties
summary: Fair Isaac (NYSE:FICO) has launched the FICO Score Credit Insights Lab, a digital platform for advanced credit analytics and portfolio modeling. The lab gives lenders tools to test new scoring models, benchmark portfolios, and assess the impact of using alternative data. A key focus is responsibly expanding credit access, including support for credit invisible and underserved consumers. Fair Isaac, trading at around $995.0, is rolling out the Credit Insights Lab at a time when its shares...
